rationale: The proposed change modifies a property tax exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). Elec. Code §271.001 governs applicability of Election Code titles to joint elections. The two provisions address unrelated subject matter.
quote: Sec. 271.001. APPLICABILITY OF OTHER PARTS OF CODE. The other titles of this code apply to a joint election except provisions that are inconsistent with this chapter or that cannot feasibly be applied to a joint election.
_note: No relationship between proposed Tax Code change and Election Code joint-election provision.
